about.title: About Us
about.story: We are dedicated to providing the purest and most elegant crystal products...
about.storyEnergy: We believe every crystal carries its own unique energy and story. From carefully selected raw stones to handcrafted finished pieces, every step reflects our commitment to quality and beauty.
